message:
revert(abi): restore working malloc_abi from c8a3452 to fix LD_PRELOAD regression

The malloc_abi.rs changes in 1e83067 (bump allocator overhaul with
BumpHeader/HashMap/Mutex tracking) caused ALL LD_PRELOAD programs to hang.
The HashMap/Mutex in the bump allocator path deadlocks during early startup.

Reverting to the working version from c8a3452 which had 59/60 programs passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
